title: fragaria collina var. collivaga
intro: Fragaria collina var. collivaga, also known as the alpine strawberry, is a specific variety of the Fragaria collina species, which is a type of wild strawberry native to mountainous regions. The medicinal properties of Fragaria collina var. collivaga include its high concentration of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming this plant include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Fragaria collina var. collivaga can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
